payload.title: Deprecation of Ad-Hoc Actuator Scripts
payload.details: Formally banned the use of ephemeral Python scripts for graph mutation. All state changes must now be declared as JSON intents in `/intents/` and executed via `bin/engine.py`. This ensures perfect lineage in `intent_ledger.jsonl` and decouples the AI's cognitive work (IR) from deterministic file I/O operations.
